topPlaces.name: Maithon
topPlaces.description: Maithon is a census town in Nirsa CD Block in Dhanbad Sadar subdivision of Dhanbad district in the Indian state of Jharkhand.

topPlaces.name: Ramnagar, Kulti
topPlaces.description: Ramnagar (also spelt Ramnagore) is a locality of Asansol Municipal Corporation, in the Paschim Bardhaman district in the Indian state of West Bengal. It is known for the Ramnagar colliery, once a captive mine of IISCO, and now part of Steel Authority of India Limited.

topPlaces.name: Mera, Dhanbad
topPlaces.description: Mera is a census town in Nirsa CD block in Dhanbad Sadar subdivision of Dhanbad district in the Indian state of Jharkhand.

topPlaces.name: Salanpur
topPlaces.description: Salanpur is a village, in the Salanpur CD block in the Asansol Sadar subdivision of the Paschim Bardhaman district in the state of West Bengal, India.

topPlaces.name: Chirkunda
topPlaces.description: Chirkunda is a city and a notified area in Dhanbad Sadar subdivision of Dhanbad district in the state of Jharkhand, India. It is located in the northeast of Jharkhand and lies very close to the state borders of West Bengal.

topPlaces.name: Siuliban
topPlaces.description: Shiblibari is a census town in Nirsa CD block in Dhanbad Sadar subdivision of Dhanbad district in the Indian state of Jharkhand.

topPlaces.name: Kumardubi
topPlaces.description: Kumardubi (also spelled Kumardhubi) is an industrial neighbourhood located within the Nirsa CD Block of Dhanbad district, in the Indian state of Jharkhand. Although widely recognized as a distinct industrial locality, Kumardubi is not identified as a separate place or mouza in the 2011 census; maps in the District Census Handbook of Dhanbad indicate that it may be included within Chirkunda.

topPlaces.name: Salanpur Area
topPlaces.description: Salanpur Area is one of the 14 operational areas of Eastern Coalfields Limited located in Asansol subdivision of Paschim Bardhaman district, in the state of West Bengal, India.

items.note: Maithon is a census town in Nirsa CD Block in Dhanbad Sadar subdivision of Dhanbad district in the Indian state of Jharkhand.

Ramnagar (also spelt Ramnagore) is a locality of Asansol Municipal Corporation, in the Paschim Bardhaman district in the Indian state of West Bengal. It is known for the Ramnagar colliery, once a captive mine of IISCO, and now part of Steel Authority of India Limited.
Mera is a census town in Nirsa CD block in Dhanbad Sadar subdivision of Dhanbad district in the Indian state of Jharkhand.
Salanpur is a village, in the Salanpur CD block in the Asansol Sadar subdivision of the Paschim Bardhaman district in the state of West Bengal, India.

Chirkunda is a city and a notified area in Dhanbad Sadar subdivision of Dhanbad district in the state of Jharkhand, India. It is located in the northeast of Jharkhand and lies very close to the state borders of West Bengal.
Shiblibari is a census town in Nirsa CD block in Dhanbad Sadar subdivision of Dhanbad district in the Indian state of Jharkhand.

Kumardubi (also spelled Kumardhubi) is an industrial neighbourhood located within the Nirsa CD Block of Dhanbad district, in the Indian state of Jharkhand. Although widely recognized as a distinct industrial locality, Kumardubi is not identified as a separate place or mouza in the 2011 census; maps in the District Census Handbook of Dhanbad indicate that it may be included within Chirkunda.
Salanpur Area is one of the 14 operational areas of Eastern Coalfields Limited located in Asansol subdivision of Paschim Bardhaman district, in the state of West Bengal, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Kalyaneshwari Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Kalyaneshwari Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Kalyaneshwari Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Birsa Munda Airport, Ranchi (162 km) and the nearest railway station is Dhanbad Junction (41 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Kalyaneshwari Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Kalyaneshwari Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Kalyaneshwari Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Kalyaneshwari Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Kalyaneshwari Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Maithon, Ramnagar, Kulti, Mera, Dhanbad, Salanpur, Chirkunda.
